# Rata-Rata Beban Dosen PMPSTI per Semester

```{r}
#| label: tbl-ewmp-dtps
#| tbl-cap: "Ekuivalen Waktu Mengajar Penuh (EWMP) DTPS"
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

big_table <- read_csv(
  here("appendix/data", "03_ewmp_dtps.csv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character()),
  na = ""
)

big_table[is.na(big_table)] <- ""

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {

  library(DT)

  datatable(
    big_table,
    rownames = FALSE,
    style = "bootstrap4",
    class = "table-bordered table-condensed table-hover",
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = "caption-side: top; text-align: center; 
               font-size: 130%; font-weight: bold;",
      "Ekuivalen Waktu Mengajar Penuh (EWMP) DTPS"
    ),
    options = list(
      pageLength = 10,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE,
      dom = "lfrtip",
      columnDefs = list(
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = "_all")
      ),
      language = list(
        search      = "Cari:",
        lengthMenu  = "Tampilkan _MENU_ data",
        info        = "Menampilkan _START_ sampai _END_ dari _TOTAL_ data",
        paginate    = list(previous = "Sebelumnya", `next` = "Berikutnya"),
        zeroRecords = "Data tidak ditemukan"
      )
    )
  )

} else {

  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  # Buat align otomatis sesuai jumlah kolom
  align_vec <- rep("c", ncol(big_table))
  align_vec[2] <- "l"  # misalnya kolom ke-2 rata kiri

  kable(
    big_table,
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    longtable = TRUE,
    caption   = "Ekuivalen Waktu Mengajar Penuh (EWMP) DTPS",
    escape    = TRUE,
    align     = align_vec
  ) |>
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("striped", "repeat_header", "scale_down"),
      font_size = 7
    ) |>
    column_spec(1, width = "0.5cm") |>
    column_spec(2, width = "4cm")

}
```
